global_description: Large marine mammal with streamlined, elongated body, smooth skin, typically gray or blue, prominent dorsal fin, large flippers, and a broad tail fluke.

part_details.head: Large with a rounded forehead, sometimes with a prominent blowhole on top.
part_details.body: Elongated and streamlined, covered in smooth skin, often gray or blue.
part_details.dorsal fin: Prominent, located on the back, varies in size and shape.
part_details.flippers: Large, paddle-shaped, located on the sides of the body.
part_details.tail fluke: Broad and flat, used for propulsion, located at the rear.

spatial_relations: Head at front, tail fluke at rear
Dorsal fin on top of body
